children.heading: .—Error of Law
children.label: a .—Error of Law
children.text: A finding or sentence of a military commission under this chapter may not be held incorrect on the ground of an error of law unless the error materially prejudices the substantial rights of the accused.

children.heading: .—Lesser Included Offense
children.label: b .—Lesser Included Offense
children.text: Any reviewing authority with the power to approve or affirm a finding of guilty by a military commission under this chapter may approve or affirm, instead, so much of the finding as includes a lesser included offense.
